titleStmt.title: SII 18.49: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 49. (B.K. No. 128 of 1933-34.) BIJƒÄPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south entrance to ƒÄrk-KillƒÅh.

summary.p: This incomplete record refers itself to the reign of Jagadƒìkamalla and is dated in ≈öaka 958, ≈örƒ´mukha, Pushya ≈õu. P≈´r·πáimƒÅ, Sunday. The cyclic year ≈örƒ´mukha coincided with ≈öaka 955 and in that year the tithi cited fell on December 8, A.D. 1033, which was a Saturday. In ≈öaka 958, the details do not work out correctly. The palaeography and the mistake in date raise a doubt regarding the genuineness of the record.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
